class.note: Registra todos los seguros de vida\\
class.help: Tabla codificadora de seguros de vida
class.label: Seguro de Vida
class.name: SEGURO_VIDA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_seguro_vida as oi_seguro_vida, t0.c_seguro_vida as c_seguro_vida, t0.d_seguro_vida as d_seguro_vida, SEC.policy, t0.c_seguro_vida as CODE, t0.d_seguro_vida as TEXT FROM ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Seguros_Vida.SEGURO_VIDA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_seguro_vida LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_seguro_vida asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_seguro_vida as oi_seguro_vida, SEC.policy FROM ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Seguros_Vida.SEGURO_VIDA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_seguro_vida LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_seguro_vida asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Seguros_Vida.SEGURO_VIDA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Seguros_Vida.SEGURO_VIDA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA.oi_seguro_vida) as CNT from ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA.oi_seguro_vida={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA.d_seguro_vida,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG45_SEGUROS_VIDA.c_seguro_vida,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
